item.title: wp-cli/scaffold-package-command
item.description: Scaffolds WP-CLI commands with functional tests, full README.md, and more.

item.title: wp-cli/scaffold-command
item.description: Generates code for post types, taxonomies, blocks, plugins, child themes, etc.

item.title: keygen-sh/keygen-api
item.description: Keygen is a fair source software licensing and distribution API built with Ruby on Rails. For developers, by developers.
